name: Validate CircleCI Config on Edit
description: Automatically validates the CircleCI configuration file when it is edited, using the official CircleCI MCP config_helper tool.

then.prompt: The CircleCI config file was just edited. Read the full contents of .circleci/config.yml and use the CircleCI MCP server's config_helper tool to validate it. If there are errors, report them clearly and suggest fixes. If the config is valid, confirm it passes validation.
